Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: MMLEADS │ August 2021 │ V 1.0 18 

66 = Children Eligible for Dental Only Supplemental Coverage 
67 = Targeted Low-Income 
69 = Individuals with Mental Health Conditions (expansion group) 
70 = Family Planning Participants (expansion group)

73 = Adult Group — Individuals at or below 133% FPL, 19–64, not newly eligible for non-1905z(3)
